title: The Laughter of Iron Harvests
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: In the muddy aftermath of the Battle of the Somme, a British sapper assigned to clear unexploded shells discovers the Germans buried a functioning gramophone beneath no-man's-land, and that its recordings contain the voices of soldiers from both sides — including his own brother who died two years earlier.
long_description: In the muddy aftermath of the Battle of the Somme, a British sapper assigned to clear unexploded shells discovers the Germans buried a functioning gramophone beneath no-man's-land, and that its recordings contain the voices of soldiers from both sides — including his own brother who died two years earlier.
main_characters: Captain Eleanor Finch (his sister, a field nurse)
